hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q 'prisma/schema\.prisma' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"prisma/schema.prisma was just modified. You MUST create a new migration file in prisma/migrations/ before finishing. Use a timestamp directory name (e.g. 20260323HHMMSS_describe_change) with a migration.sql inside. Follow the existing pattern: use CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS, and DO $$ BEGIN ... END $$ guards for foreign keys and enums. Never skip this step — missing migrations cause P2021/P2022 errors in production."}}' || true
